info.name: API Data Pipeline - Endpoint Testing
info.description: Postman collection for validating API endpoints used in the data pipeline. Author: Vijay Teli

request.description: Retrieve all user records. Expected: 10 records with nested address and company objects.
Retrieve single user by ID. Used for validation and debugging.
Retrieve all posts. Expected: 100 records linked to users via userId.
Filter posts by userId. Used to validate user-post relationship.
